title: zostera muelleri subsp. novazelandica
intro: Zostera muelleri subsp. novazelandica, also known as the New Zealand eelgrass or New Zealand mudflat eelgrass, is a subspecies of seagrass that belongs to the family Zosteraceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Zostera muelleri subsp. novazelandica include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, and its antioxidant properties may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In traditional herbal medicine, Zostera muelleri subsp. novazelandica is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried powder, which can be used to support overall well-being and health.
